name: guild
description: Agent-first work contracts: mandates, claims, proof, and replay.

scripts.check:agentdesk-ts: corepack pnpm run build:agentdesk-ts && corepack pnpm --dir packages/agentdesk-core run test && corepack pnpm --dir packages/agentdesk-github run test && corepack pnpm --dir packages/agentdesk-mcp run test && corepack pnpm --dir packages/agentdesk-cli run test
scripts.build:agentdesk-ts: corepack pnpm --dir packages/agentdesk-core run build && corepack pnpm --dir packages/agentdesk-github run build && corepack pnpm --dir packages/agentdesk-mcp run build && corepack pnpm --dir packages/agentdesk-cli run build
